home.title: Learn cybersecurity through structure, evidence, and practice.
home.body: HardenPath organizes fundamentals, controlled labs, quizzes, and badges into a readable path. The goal is to build useful, legal, and verifiable skills.

course.premiumNotice: This module includes premium exercises or validation.

account.title: Account and progress
account.body: Create a local account to keep progress, quiz attempts, badges, and premium access.
account.name: Name

ethics.title: HardenPath ethics charter
ethics.body: The platform teaches cybersecurity within a legal, defensive, and responsible framework.
principles: Only run offensive tests on systems you own or have explicit permission to assess.
Prefer labs, CTFs, and isolated environments.
Document risk carefully and respect confidentiality.
Do not publish sensitive data, credentials, real exploitation evidence, or workflows aimed at unauthorized targets.
